name: Facebook Marketplace Monitor API
description: Search, monitor, and extract Facebook Marketplace listings via mobile carrier proxies. Keyword search, listing details, category browsing, and new listing tracking.
longDescription: A Facebook Marketplace intelligence API for agent workflows: search listings by keyword/location, retrieve listing details, browse categories, and detect newly posted listings in a defined window.

pricing.comparison: Most Facebook Marketplace data providers require subscriptions and account setup. This service is x402 pay-per-request, making it easier for one-off agent tasks and small-volume automation.

whyMobileProxy: Facebook aggressively challenges non-consumer traffic. Mobile carrier IPs provide better pass rates for marketplace pages and location-specific listing retrieval than standard datacenter routes.
limitations: Results depend on location and active marketplace inventory
Some listing details may be partial when Facebook serves lightweight previews
Aggressive burst traffic can trigger temporary anti-bot friction

endpoints.description: Get full listing details by Facebook listing ID
List all marketplace categories with browse URLs
Monitor new listings matching a keyword/location
